sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n234" key="a)gaqa/ggelos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθάγγελος</orth>, <sense id="n234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing good tidings,</tr_> trans. of Persian <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Οἰβάρας,</foreign> Nic.Dam.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg002:p.53:14D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.53.14D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
